title: At a Coffee Shop 咖啡店

lines.en: Let me buy you a coffee, Ann.
Thank you, Lily. But I do not like coffee.
lines.zh: 谢谢你，莉莉。但我不喜欢咖啡。

lines.en: They have tea and juice too.
I would like a hot chocolate, please.
Great choice. I will have a latte.
Can I have some cake with that?
Of course. The chocolate cake here is wonderful.
lines.zh: 当然可以。这儿的巧克力蛋糕很棒。

lines.en: Then I will take a piece of chocolate cake.
lines.zh: 那我要一块巧克力蛋糕。

lines.en: Let us find a seat by the window.
lines.zh: 我们找个靠窗的位子吧。

lines.en: Perfect. I love this coffee shop!
lines.zh: 太好了。我喜欢这家咖啡店！
